steps.comment: Parsed 8 recommendations from report: 3 [CODE], 2 [ARCHITECTURE], 3 [SKILL]. Report covers 3rd recurrence of delegation failure in feature-pipeline.
Verification complete. 3 APPROVED, 4 APPROVED WITH NOTES, 1 REJECTED (rec 7: check-phase-gate.py — not related to root cause). User confirmed.

7 fixes applied via 5 parallel agents. Rec 1: validator critical mode (5 replacements). Rec 2: validator connected to SKILL.md phase 10 + finalizer. Rec 3+4: section 20 in skills-agents-rules.md + CLAUDE.md reference. Rec 5: INVARIANT block in SKILL.md. Rec 6: pending-delegations.md created. Rec 8: apply-root-cause-fixes updated for tracker.
Verification passed: all 7 changes confirmed via grep/file checks. No Python code changed — pytest not needed.
